Brian Conlon, Esq. (415.398.0900; bsc@phillaw.com) of Phillips Erlewine Given & Carlin LLP for Plaintiffs.
Nick Deming, Esq. (415.986.5900; ndeming@grsm.com) of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP for Defendants.

PLAINTIFFS KHALID LAHLOU and DAVINA LIVARES' Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRIAN S. CONLON, Esq. of Phillips, Erlewine, Given & Carlin LLP (Tel: 415-398-0900) for plaintiffs;
Atty. NICHOLAS A. DEMING, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendants Boboquivaris LLC and Andrea Froncillo.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS KHALID LAHLOU and DAVINA LIVARES' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear regarding the selection of a date for the Final Approval Hearing.

Matter discussed and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement" is granted.

The Final Approval Hearing is set for November 16, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
